plan.description: Read src/range.ts and identify the off-by-one bug in the range() function. Record findings in state.
Fix the bug using edit. After fixing, set state.fix_applied = true.

initialState.bug_description: The range() function has an off-by-one error: range(1, 5) should return [1, 2, 3, 4, 5] but returns [1, 2, 3, 4]

assertions.description: State should confirm fix was applied
